caption:
My name is Kira. 🦇 Tonight, I'm the ghost in the machine. The chrome railing of the 100th floor penthouse hummed beneath my palm, the wind tugging at the hem of my custom bodysuit. Tight, black, matte latex that hugged every inch of my figure but hid the truth beneath layers of strategic padding and illusion. My chest rose and fell with purpose. My ass was a silhouette of power under the fabric.

A shadow detached itself from the alleyway below. My heart hammered. 🥁 I knew the signal, the scent, the heartbeat of the enforcer seeking the key I carry.

"Kira," a voice whispered.

"I'm listening, darling," I replied. The neon lights painted my face. I smiled, gaze dropping slightly, heat rising in my pulse.

He knew I was here. Dangerous. But he didn't know that this body, beneath my gear, was designed for more than hacking. 🖤

I stepped closer to the edge. The wind whipped my hair. The heat of city lights warmed my skin. My fingers traced the zipper of my thigh-high boots.

"Ready to dive into the dark, baby?" I whispered.

The click echoed. Adrenaline spiked, tightening my core. Every step felt deliberate, calculated, undeniably sexy. This wasn't just survival. A game of cat and mouse against the skyline.

I pushed off the railing, coat flaring like wings.
